name: Hour Loop, Inc
business: Hour Loop is an online retailer that sells home/garden decor, toys, kitchenware, apparel, and electronics to U.S. consumers. It operates primarily as a third-party seller on Amazon, generating practically all of its revenue through the Amazon sales platform.

tamClaims.claim: Total U.S. retail sales increased 3.5% to approximately $7.68 trillion in 2025, from $7.42 trillion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Marketplace Pulse (based on U.S. Census Bureau data), total U.S. retail sales increased 3.5% to approximately $7.68 trillion in 2025, from $7.42 trillion in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Consumers spent $1,233.7 billion online with U.S. merchants in 2025, which represents approximately 16.4% of total U.S. retail sales for the year.
tamClaims.sentence: Consumers spent $1,233.7 billion online with U.S. merchants in 2025, which represents approximately 16.4% of total U.S. retail sales for the year, compared to 16.07% in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Amazon is estimated to account for approximately 40.4% of all U.S. e-commerce sales.
tamClaims.sentence: Amazon is estimated to account for approximately 40.4% of all U.S. e-commerce sales, according to third-party industry analyses, making it the largest e-commerce retailer currently in the market.

tamClaims.claim: Amazon has over 180 million Prime members in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: Amazon has over 180 million Prime members in the U.S., and we were seeing continuous year over year growth over the past years.
